# llms.txt

# UXCraft

> One-stop UXCraft skill for AI coding agents. Activate with `/uxcraft` only.

Important files for AI discovery:

- `SKILL.md`: primary orchestration skill.
- `README.md`: installation, usage, positioning, validation, and package details.
- `system-prompts/uxcraft-system-add-on.md`: full system prompt add-on.
- `system-prompts/uxcraft-compact.md`: compact add-on for short custom-instruction fields.
- `system-prompts/uxcraft-mcp-add-on.md`: MCP usage instructions.
- `docs/mcp-server.md`: MCP server tools, resources, prompts, and client config.
- `docs/slash-command-compatibility.md`: cross-agent `/uxcraft` behavior.
- `ai-discovery/uxcraft.manifest.json`: machine-readable package manifest.

Activation rule:

Use UXCraft only when the user includes `/uxcraft`. If the user does not include `/uxcraft`, do not apply this workflow automatically.

MCP:

Run `uxcraft-mcp` or `npx -y --package uxcraft uxcraft-mcp` to expose the package as local MCP tools/resources/prompts.
